 Personal Loan benefits and features

  • No hidden charges

    ICICI Bank Personal Loans come with transparent charges and fee structures, helping borrowers understand all applicable costs upfront.

  • No foreclosure charges

    Enjoy zero foreclosure charges after payment of 24 EMIs, offering added flexibility in loan repayment.

  • Flexible tenure

    Choose a repayment tenure of up to 72 months to manage your fixed monthly installments comfortably.

  • No collateral required

    Get a Personal Loan without pledging any security or assets, making the borrowing process simple and hassle-free.

    Apply for a Personal loan of up to ₹50 lakh through a convenient and fully digital process.

  • Fixed interest Rates

    Benefit from fixed interest rates starting from 9.99%* p.a. that help maintain stable and predictable EMIs throughout the loan tenure.

About Personal Loan

What is a Personal Loan?

A Personal Loan is an unsecured loan that helps individuals meet financial requirements such as medical expenses, travel, education, wedding costs, home renovation and other planned or urgent needs. Since no collateral is required, approval is generally based on factors such as income, repayment capacity and credit history. ICICI Bank Personal Loans come with flexible repayment tenure, competitive interest rates and convenient EMI options. Customers may also need documents such as PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, income proof and bank statements while applying. Maintaining a healthy CIBIL score may improve loan eligibility and approval chances.

What Can a Personal Loan Be Used For?

A Personal Loan can be used for multiple personal and financial requirements depending on the borrower’s needs. Customers often apply for Personal Loans to manage planned expenses as well as emergency financial situations without disturbing long-term savings or investments.

Common Uses of a Personal Loan

  • Medical emergencies and hospital expenses
  • Wedding-related expenses and celebrations
  • Home renovation or interior upgrades
  • Domestic or international travel plans
  • Higher education or skill development courses
  • Purchase of gadgets, appliances or lifestyle products
  • Managing unexpected financial requirements

ICICI Bank Personal Loans offer flexible usage, making them suitable for different financial goals with structured EMI repayment options.

Minimum CIBIL Score Required for Personal Loan

A good CIBIL score plays an important role in Personal Loan approval and interest rate eligibility. While the minimum required score may vary depending on the applicant profile and internal assessment, a higher credit score generally improves the chances of approval. A strong repayment history, low credit utilisation and timely payment of existing EMIs and dues may help maintain a healthy CIBIL score. Banks also evaluate income stability, employment profile and existing financial obligations before approving a Personal Loan application.

A score of 750 and above is preferred.

Do’s and Don’ts About Personal Loan

Do’s

  • Compare loan amount, interest rate and repayment tenure before applying
  • Check EMI affordability using a Personal Loan EMI Calculator
  • Maintain a healthy credit score for better eligibility
  • Read the applicable fees, charges and repayment terms carefully
  • Submit accurate income and employment details during application
  • Pay EMIs on time to maintain a strong repayment history

Don’ts

  • Avoid borrowing more than your repayment capacity
  • Do not apply for multiple loans simultaneously without requirement
  • Avoid delaying EMI payments or missing due dates
  • Do not ignore the total borrowing cost including charges and interest
  • Avoid sharing sensitive banking or OTP details with unknown sources
  • Do not depend on unsecured borrowing for unnecessary spending

Responsible borrowing and timely repayment can help customers manage Personal Loans efficiently while maintaining financial discipline.

Documents required to apply for Personal Loan online

Indian citizens aged between 18-58 years can apply for this loan.

  • Proof of identity and residence

  • Latest 3 months' bank statement (where the salary or income is credited)

  • Salary slips for the last 3 months

  • PAN Card and Aadhaar Card

Popular Personal Loan FAQs

Do I need to provide a security or collateral to apply for a Personal Loan with ICICI Bank?

No, ICICI Bank offers its customers a collateral-free Personal Loan without any security. Visit our website to apply for an instant Personal Loan online.

What is the minimum and maximum amount of Personal Loan offered by ICICI Bank?

ICICI Bank offers Personal Loans starting at ₹50,000 up to ₹50,00,000.

What is the repayment tenure of a Personal Loan?

ICICI Bank Personal Loan repayment tenure ranges from 12 months to 72 months.

Can I foreclose my Loan with ICICI Bank?

Personal Loan foreclosure facility is extended to all customers availing a Personal Loan with ICICI Bank. Customers can foreclose their Personal Loan after the payment of at least one EMI. However, foreclosure charges (and taxes) will be applicable as per the service charges.

Why was my Personal Loan application rejected?

Your Personal Loan application might have been declined due to a low credit score or unstable income or high existing debts or incomplete documents or not meeting ICICI Bank’s eligibility criteria and policies.

Can I get instant approval on a Personal Loan?

Yes, ICICI Bank offers Instant Personal Loans to eligible customers. You can get instant loan approval without any documentation based on your credit profile, income and banking relationship with ICICI Bank.

Is a Personal Loan from ICICI Bank available for short-term needs?

Yes, ICICI Bank offers short-term Personal Loans with flexible tenures starting from 12 months, that help you manage urgent or small-ticket expenses conveniently and efficiently.

How do I check my eligibility for a Personal Loan?

You can check your Personal Loan eligibility and apply for a Personal Loan online through the ICICI Bank website. The common eligibility criteria are as follows:

For Salaried Individuals:

  • Age: 20–58 years
  • Income: minimum ₹30,000 or month
  • Work Experience: 2 years

For Self-Employed Individuals:

  • Age: 23–65 years
  • Loan limit: Up to ₹ 50 lakh
  • Duration (Age) of Business: 2 years
  • Overall Experience: 3 years

Note- You can also know your eligible loan amount using the ICICI Bank Personal Loan Eligibility Calculator before you apply online.

How to check the status of a Personal Loan application?

You can track the status of your Personal Loan application on the ICICI Bank website or ICICI Bank's iMobile app or by contacting Customer Care on 1800 1080, using your application number or registered mobile number.

How can I transfer my existing Personal Loan to ICICI Bank?

You can apply for a Balance transfer with ICICI Bank by submitting your loan details to get a lower interest rate and tenure. The Bank will assess your request and if approved, your loan will be transferred.

How to download a Personal Loan statement?

Log into ICICI Bank Net Banking or the iMobile app, go to the ‘Loans’ section and download your Personal Loan statement in PDF format for any chosen period.

Can I get insurance on a Personal Loan?

Yes, you can get Personal Loan insurance after loan disbursement. It protects your family by covering the remaining (outstanding) amount in case of unforeseen events such as death or disability.

How do I apply for a Personal Loan through the digital process?

You can apply for a Personal Loan online through the ICICI Bank iMobile app by entering details, uploading documents, and completing verification, making the process fully digital and seamless.

How do I check my loan repayment schedule, due date, and payment history?

You can check your loan repayment schedule, due dates, and payment history through Net Banking or ICICI Bank’s iMobile app, ensuring easy tracking and complete transparency.

Are there any additional charges applicable for Personal Loans pre-closure?

When applying for a loan, no foreclosure charges apply after 24 EMIs, as per policy. However, before completing this period, applicable charges may apply depending on the loan terms.

Does a Personal Loan offer tax benefits?

A Personal Loan is not designed with tax benefits, as it is an unsecured form of credit. However, if the funds are used for purposes like home renovation, certain tax benefits may be available under applicable tax provisions, depending on eligibility and documentation.

Are GST charges included in the Personal Loan processing fee?

All charges are exclusive of Goods and Services Tax (GST). Applicable GST and other statutory taxes or levies are charged over and above the fees levied by the Bank, including the Personal Loan processing fee.

Can I get a loan with just a PAN & Aadhaar number?

PAN and Aadhaar are required for verification, but are not sufficient on their own for approval. Additional documents, such as proof of income and bank statements, are also required.

Is there any stamp duty applicable for taking a Personal Loan?

ICICI Bank does not levy stamp duty on a Personal Loan. Stamp duty, if applicable as per state rules, is included in the applicable charges during the application process.
